name: d365-escalation
description: Creates a D365 Customer Service case (or appends to an existing one) when the topic-router decides the citizen interaction needs human review, accessibility support, or low-confidence escalation.

input.transcriptRef: string (App Insights operationId or ADLS blob URI)

fallbackBehaviour: If the call fails, the topic-router records the escalation request to the Service Bus dead-letter and surfaces a graceful 'we will call you back' to the citizen.
